name: Shivers
description: Shivers is a horror themed point and click adventure.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.label: Ixupi Captures Needed
options.description: Number of Ixupi Captures needed for goal condition.

options.label: Lobby Access
options.description: Chooses how keys needed to reach the lobby are placed.

options.label: Puzzle Hints Required
options.description: If turned on puzzle hints/solutions will be available before the corresponding puzzle is required.

options.label: Include Information Plaques
options.description: Adds Information Plaques as checks.

options.label: Front Door Usable
options.description: Adds a key to unlock the front door of the museum.

options.label: Elevators Stay Solved
options.description: Adds elevators as checks and will remain open upon solving them.

options.label: Early Beth
options.description: Beth's body is open at the start of the game.

options.label: Early Lightning
options.description: Allows lightning to be captured at any point in the game.

options.label: Location Pot Pieces
options.description: Chooses where pot pieces will be located within the multiworld.

options.label: Full Pots
options.description: Chooses if pots will be in pieces or already completed - Pieces: Only pot pieces will be added to the item pool - Complete: Only completed pots will be added to the item pool - Mixed: Each pot will be randomly chosen to be pieces or already completed.

options.label: Ixupi Captures Priority
options.description: Ixupi captures are set to priority locations.

options.label: Puzzle Collect Behavior
options.description: Defines what happens to puzzles on collect.
